entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., the legume crop studied for nonnodulating traits

entities.name: NONNODULATING
entities.description: A trait where plants fail to form root nodules, hindering biological nitrogen fixation

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL NITROGEN FIXATION
entities.description: The process by which certain plants and bacteria convert atmospheric N2 into ammonia

entities.name: LEGUME
entities.description: A group of plants that can form symbiotic relationships with nitrogen-fixing bacteria

entities.name: NODULATION OBSERVATION
entities.description: The method of inspecting roots for nodules at 22 and 112 days after sowing

entities.name: FIELD CONDITIONS
entities.description: The environment in which the chickpea accessions were grown

entities.name: DAYS AFTER SOWING
entities.description: The specific time intervals used for nodulation checks

entities.name: INOCULATION
entities.description: The process of introducing Rhizobium strain 1C 59 to confirm the nonnodulating trait

entities.name: RHIZOBIUM STRAIN 1C 59
entities.description: The specific bacterial strain used to test for nodulation in chickpea

entities.name: AGRONOMIC EVALUATION
entities.description: The study of plant performance and growth under field conditions

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH
entities.description: The overall physical development of the plant

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of seed produced by the plant

entities.name: NITROGEN FERTILIZATION
entities.description: The application of 50 to 100 kg N ha−1 to the plants

entities.name: LOW NITROGEN FIELD
entities.description: A field environment lacking nitrogen fertilizer

entities.name: LEAF COLOR
entities.description: The visual color of the leaves, which becomes light green in nonnodulating plants under low N

entities.name: INTERNODAL DISTANCE
entities.description: The length of the stem between nodes, which is short in nonnodulating plants under low N

entities.name: LEAF SIZE
entities.description: The dimensions of leaves and leaflets, which are small in nonnodulating plants under low N

entities.name: LEAF PIGMENTATION
entities.description: The presence of reddish-brown pigment on leaf margins in nonnodulating plants under low N
